title: panicum subflabellatum
intro: Panicum subflabellatum, also known as the broad-leaved panic grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Panicum subflabellatum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to improve digestion and reduce stress. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies in the form of poultices and ointments.
